Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorSaleItemMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.Icon:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.TitleArea, "BOTTOMLEFT", -20, -5); self.UnitPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Icon, "TOPRIGHT", 0, 5); self.UnitPrice:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.Icon, "RIGHT", 330, 0); self.StackPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.UnitPrice, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, -25); self.StackPrice:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.UnitPrice, "RIGHT"); self.Stacks:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.StackPrice, "BOTTOMLEFT", 112, -30); self.Stacks:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.UnitPrice, "RIGHT"); self.Duration:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.UnitPrice, "TOPRIGHT"); self.Duration:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.UnitPrice, "RIGHT", 200, 0); self.PostButton:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Duration, "BOTTOMLEFT", 20, -19); self.SkipButton:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.PostButton, "TOPRIGHT"); self.PrevButton:SetPoint("TOPRIGHT", self.PostButton, "TOPLEFT"); self.BidPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.PostButton, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.Deposit:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Duration, "TOPRIGHT", 20, 0); self.DepositPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Deposit, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.Total:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.DepositPrice, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.TotalPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Total, "BOTTOMLEFT")

Mixin(self, AuctionatorGroupsViewItemMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorBagItemSelectedMixin); self.clickEventName = "BagItemClicked"; self:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self:GetParent().Icon, "TOPLEFT"); self:SetPoint("BOTTOMRIGHT", self:GetParent().Icon, "BOTTOMRIGHT")

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigMoneyInputMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_UNIT_PRICE; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.Label:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.MoneyInput, "LEFT", -10, 0)

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigMoneyInputMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_STACK_PRICE; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.Label:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.MoneyInput, "LEFT", -10, 0)

Mixin(self, AuctionatorStackOfInputMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.MaxNumStacks:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.NumStacks, "BOTTOMLEFT", 10, -4); self.Label:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.NumStacks, "TOPRIGHT", 10, -3); self.StackSize:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Label, "TOPRIGHT", 10, 3); self.MaxStackSize:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.StackSize, "BOTTOMLEFT", 10, -4)
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonGroupMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigHorizontalRadioButtonGroupMixin); self.groupHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DURATION; self:InitializeRadioButtonGroup()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigMoneyInputMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_STACK_BID_PRICE; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.Label:SetPoint("RIGHT", self.MoneyInput, "LEFT", -10, 0)
